<!-- dropbox: https://www.dropbox.com/preview/CbDD_Dienstordner/literatur/altes%20corpus/chunked/chunked/Band07_chunk004.pdf#page=18 -->
<!-- citation-page-top: Band07 p184 -->

<!-- header: KIRCHBERG -->

<!-- header: KIRCHBERG -->


[[File:Band07_chunk004_p018_img001.jpg|thumb|A Kreuzigung Per]]



[[File:Band07_chunk004_p018_img002.jpg|thumb]]


184
<!-- citation-page-bottom: Band07 p185 -->
